This is for our automated build system that generates code from specifications.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
    <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0">
            <!-- pom-model -->
            <!--- end pom-model -->

            <!-- maven-plugins -->
            <build>
                <!-- exec-maven-plugin -->
                    <defaultGoal>clean install</defaultGoal>
                        <!--- end exec-maven-plugin -->
                    </target>
                <!-- antrun-plugin -->
                <!--- end antrun-plugin -->

            <!-- fetch-maven-plugin -->
            <!-- url-to-remote -->
            <!--- end fetch-maven-plugin -->
